metadata.penalty_scope: post-hoc score subtraction for top-k fingerprint hits whose expected cofactor families are absent from the selected structure or only outside the local active-site neighborhood
metadata.top_k_boundary: policy analysis reranks only the fingerprint hits already present in the retrieval artifact

rows.label_rationale: Glutamate racemase uses cysteine acid-base racemization chemistry, which is not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
Class A beta-lactamase is a serine beta-lactamase but not the Ser-His-Asp/Glu triad hydrolase fingerprint currently defined.
NAD(P)H dehydrogenase quinone chemistry is flavin redox hydride transfer, matching the flavin dehydrogenase or reductase seed.
Copper nitrite reductase performs metal-centered electron-transfer reduction chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Carboxypeptidase D uses a Ser-His-Asp catalytic triad for peptide-bond hydrolysis, fitting the Ser-His-Asp/Glu hydrolase seed.
Glutathione-disulfide reductase is FAD/NAD(P)H disulfide redox chemistry matching the flavin dehydrogenase or reductase seed.
Isocitrate dehydrogenase performs NADP-linked oxidation and decarboxylation, not metal-activated hydrolysis in the current seed set.
Nicotinate-nucleotide diphosphorylase performs phosphoribosyl transfer chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.
Methionine adenosyltransferase performs ATP-dependent adenosyl transfer and triphosphate processing outside the current seed fingerprints.
3-hydroxydecanoyl-ACP dehydratase performs dehydration chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Deoxyribonuclease IV is a nuclease hydrolase; nuclease catalysis commonly depends on metal-activated water.
Ornithine carbamoyltransferase performs carbamoyl transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Amine dehydrogenase redox chemistry is not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
Vanadate-dependent chloride peroxidase is peroxidase chemistry but not the heme-dependent peroxidase or oxidase seed fingerprint.
